# 'worktree create' creates a new worktree at the given path.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-03-29T14:00:00Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# Create a worktree without a branch (detached HEAD).
gs worktree create $WORK/wt1
stderr 'Created worktree'

# Verify the worktree is in detached HEAD state.
cd $WORK/wt1
git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD
stdout 'HEAD'

# Go back to main repo and create a worktree with a branch.
cd $WORK/repo
gs worktree create $WORK/wt2 -b feat1
stderr 'Created worktree'
stderr 'Created and checked out branch feat1'

# Verify the branch in wt2.
cd $WORK/wt2
git branch --show-current
stdout 'feat1'

-- repo/dummy.txt --
dummy
